{{Quote|The ''Vengeance'' Frigate - an interesting design.|[[Urai Fen]]|<ref name="FoC" />}}
The '''''Vengeance''-class frigate''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] used by [[Tyber Zann]] and his [[Zann Consortium/Legends|criminal organization]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Vengeancecloak.jpg|thumb|left|160px|A ''Vengeance''-class [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] engages its [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] in battle.]]

These ships had the ability to [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloak]] using technology Zann bought from the black market. However, due to a side effect of this addition, the ships possessed no [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]]. To make up for it, they were equipped with extremely thick armor for protection. However, this extra protection dramatically affected their speed, making them very slow for their class.<ref name="FoC" />

Also, these ships were equipped with [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass drivers]], which bypassed an enemy's [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shields]], as well as standard [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]]. Lastly, ''Vengeance''-class frigates could overheat their cores to self-destruct if the situation called for it.<ref name="FoC" />

==History==
{{Quote|I've blackmailed some engineers to start production on the ship designs we scavenged from the wreckage of the Death Star. We'll use the Tibanna gas for the hyperdrives and weapon systems. The first of the new ships should be ready now.|[[Tyber Zann]]|<ref name="FoC" />}}
The ''Vengeance''-class frigates was designed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at some point prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The Zann Consortium obtained these ships after it [[Ground Battle on Bespin|raided]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Tyber used the extra [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] from the raid to design these new ships, using plans he [[Space Battle at Yavin 4|found]] in the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star's]] wreckage.<ref name="FoC" />

==Behind the scenes==
As with the [[Aggressor-class destroyer|''Aggressor''-class Star Destroyer]], the ''Vengeance''-class shares little with Imperial ship designs, bearing much more similarity with the Zann Consortium ships.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
